data.title: American Public Works Association Named a "Best Nonprofit to Work For" in 2026
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri on April 14, 2026, the American Public Works Association (APWA) was recognized as one of the top nonprofit organizations to work for in 2026 by The NonProfit Times, a leading publication in the nonprofit industry. This accolade signifies APWA's inaugural appearance on the prestigious list, highlighting their dedication to creating a positive work environment.

data.title: The Deerborne Group to Attend American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting
data.description: In San Diego on April 14, 2026, The Deerborne Group, a specialized consulting firm in genomics and precision diagnostics established in 2020, announced its participation in the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting from April 17 to 22, 2026. The event will gather experts in the field and feature presentations on the latest advancements in cancer research.

data.title: Sarasota Memorial Cancer Team Achieves 75% Early-Stage Lung Cancer Diagnosis Rate by Expanding Detection Beyond Screening
data.description: In April 14, 2026, in Sarasota, Florida, the Sarasota Memorial Health Care System (SMH) disclosed that 75% of lung cancer cases that were uncovered through a new early identification initiative at SMH's Brian D. Jellison Cancer Institute in 2025 were detected at the initial, highly treatable phases.

data.title: Stellar® Launches Web-Based Tools to Simplify Online Mailbox Conversion
data.description: Stellar®, a leading data care solutions provider, has launched an Online Mailbox Conversion platform on April 14, 2026, in Houston. This platform enables users to convert OST, MBOX, and OLM mailboxes online without the need for software installation. The service allows for secure conversion of mailboxes without any additional downloads.

data.title: Entera Bio to Host Key Opinion Leader Webinar Highlighting the Osteoporosis Treatment Landscape and the Opportunity for EB613
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Entera Bio Ltd., based in Tel Aviv, Israel, revealed plans to hold a virtual Key Opinion Leader (KOL) webinar on April 20, 2026, at 11:00 AM Eastern Time. The company, listed as ENTX on Nasdaq, specializes in oral peptides development. This webinar will center on discussing the osteoporosis treatment sector and the potential for their primary clinical candidate, EB613, an oral PTH (1-34) tablet. This event presents an opportunity for stakeholders to learn more about Entera's advancements in this field.

data.title: Pinwheel Helping Power Robinhood Banking Deposits
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Pinwheel, a financial technology company specializing in seamless account activation and engagement solutions for banks, was announced as the exclusive partner for direct deposit launch by Robinhood Banking. Robinhood, listed on NASDAQ as HOOD, opted for Pinwheel Deposit Switch for this initiative. This collaboration signifies a significant milestone for both companies in the ever-evolving fintech landscape.

data.title: Medicare Agents Helpline Connects Seniors With Top Local Medicare Agents for Best Rates & Plans in Minutes
data.description: In Indianapolis on April 14, 2026, Medicare Agents Helpline has become a crucial resource for seniors as they navigate the intricate process of Medicare enrollment. With their unwavering commitment, they have provided essential assistance to numerous individuals seeking to find optimal Medicare plans.

data.title: Grasp Technologies Appoints Maria Chevalier as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: After two years of strong leadership, Chris Wilson has stepped down from his role as the Chief Executive Officer of Grasp Technologies, a prominent travel data management solutions provider based in Dublin, Ohio. This move comes as the company has appointed industry veteran Maria Chevalier as the new Chief Executive Officer. The announcement was made today, April 14, 2026, marking a significant change in the company's leadership. Chevalier's extensive experience and expertise in the industry are expected to drive further growth and innovation within the company. Grasp Technologies continues to play a key role in the travel data management sector, with this change in leadership setting a new direction for the company.

data.title: Walker's Shortbread Launches "Shortbread That Saves" Partnership with the ASPCA®, Committing $100,000+ Annually
data.description: A recent program has transformed Walker's renowned Scottie Dog Shortbread into a means for customers to back animal welfare through their daily buys. Walker's Shortbread, a beloved shortbread producer in Scotland, recognized for its high-quality all-butter products, has introduced this initiative.

data.title: The Missing Middle: New Report Shows How California CCAs Can Unlock 5.4 GW of Untapped Energy
data.description: In California, a recent white paper sponsored by Renewable America highlights the potential for "middle mile" solar and storage initiatives to generate $6.5 billion in savings for ratepayers. The report, released in Santa Clara on April 14, 2026 by Pathfinder Communications, delves into the economic benefits of these projects.

data.title: Corteva Announces Executive Leadership Team of its Future Advanced Seed and Genetics Company
data.description: Today, Corteva Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) revealed the executive leadership team for "SpinCo," the new publicly-traded advanced seed and genetics company that will emerge from the firm's upcoming separation in the fourth quarter of 2026.

data.title: CDB Aviation Delivers Second Boeing 737-8 to T’Way
data.description: Seattle-based aircraft leasing company CDB Aviation has recently provided a second Boeing 737-8 aircraft to South Korea's T'way Air, expanding their fleet. This delivery marks a significant addition for T'way Air as they continue to enhance their services in the Asia-Pacific region. The Boeing 737-8 is a popular model known for its efficiency and reliability in the airline industry. This strategic move emphasizes CDB Aviation's commitment to supporting airlines and fostering growth in the aviation sector.

data.title: GHOST® Channels Classic Lemon-Lime Nostalgia with New 7up® Energy Drink Launch
data.description: In a recent collaboration with Keurig Dr Pepper, GHOST® has introduced a limited-time 7up® flavored energy drink. This partnership aims to bring the signature taste of 7up® into the energy drink market. GHOST® is a well-known lifestyle sports nutrition brand recognized for its genuine partnerships and commitment to transparency. The release of this new energy drink signifies a strategic move for the company to expand its product offerings. On April 14, 2026, this exciting partnership was announced in Chicago.

data.title: Spiral Therapeutics Announces $27 Million Series B Financing and Strategic Partnership with Advanced Bionics
data.description: Spiral has secured significant funding in its Series B round with contributions from new strategic investors Advanced Bionics and a leading global pharmaceutical company. The round is led by Gund Investment and sees continued support from current investors like Ferring Ventures and Uni-Bio Science Group. This collaboration in research and development brings together key players in the industry, with the total investment reaching an impressive figure.

data.title: Lyric Health Achieves SOC 2 Compliance, Advancing Enterprise-Grade Security Across Its AI-Powered Virtual Care Platform
data.description: In McKinney, Texas on April 14, 2026, Lyric Health, a virtual care platform utilizing artificial intelligence, revealed its achievement of SOC 2 compliance certification. This milestone enhances its reputation as a secure business partner.

data.title: THG Creative Debuts Temple Square Visitors' Center, a First-of-Its-Kind Immersive Experience
data.description: A newly designed visitor experience at Temple Square in Salt Lake City was recently unveiled by THG Creative, combining architecture, media, and global storytelling to offer a more engaging and narrative-driven introduction. The Temple Square Visitors' Center project was completed on April 14, 2026. This innovative approach aims to make Temple Square more accessible, with the integration of various mediums to enhance the visitor's experience.

data.title: Northern Tool + Equipment is Revving it Up with Monster Jam® Truck Appearance at Macon Store
data.description: In Macon, customers have the opportunity to snag a special offer at a store event where they can get their hands on two complimentary tickets for the thrilling Monster Jam® event. The popular company, Northern Tool + Equipment, is set to inject some high-octane entertainment into the Macon area. This exclusive deal is available on Thursday, April 30th, 2026.

data.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP Announces Shareholder Investigation of Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CVGI)
data.description: A law firm, Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP, has disclosed on April 14, 2026, that they are commencing an investigation into Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CVGI) to represent the interests of the company's shareholders. The investigation aims to assess whether the directors at Commercial Vehicle Group may have violated their duties to the shareholders.
